signals.thesis: Legal losses are stacking: 07-02 EU top court upheld the record $4.7B (revised EUR 4.1B) Android antitrust fine, after a 07-01 'one-two antitrust punch' (Yelp win vs Google, $1.5B Klarna ruling). Fine is one-time and absorbable, but the pattern raises structural-remedy risk; price already reflects stress at 361.20, -6.8% over 30d. No position to sell; not initiating into an unresolved legal cascade. Hold; revisit if price stabilizes with no new adverse rulings.

Offsets: enterprise AI wins (Haleon 07-01, Kyndryl sovereign-cloud 07-01). Price 384.38, -7.9% over 30d, near the lower third of the 30d range. Competitive worry is not yet falsifiable revenue impact; hold. Re-evaluate on Meta cloud pricing/launch details or Azure guidance.

market_context: Risk-on but split tape: Dow hit a record 07-01 on Meta's AI-cloud bet (Benzinga market wrap) and Trump hailed the S&P 500's best quarter since 2020 as US-Iran indirect talks wrapped (07-02), yet the Nasdaq fell 150+ points 07-02 with the greed index still in 'Fear'. Memory-cost inflation is the sector theme (Micron +15%/Apple -6% wrap, 06-25). Caveats: first run since 06-12 (3-week gap); today's pull is PARTIAL - fundamentals failed for all 7 tickers (proxy 403), prices+news are intact; portfolio is 100% cash so no holdings web sweep was required. VOO benchmark 685.49, +1.6% over 30d. Bias conservative: five holds, one small JNJ buy re-proposing the expired 06-12 approval whose thesis was never falsified.
